message:
fix(pass2.5): Use getZigNameSearchingUp for nested class constructors

When generating nested class constructor calls (e.g., Descriptor() inside
class A, where both are defined in method test_set_name), use
getZigNameSearchingUp to find sibling classes in parent scopes.

Previously, getZigName was used which only checked the current scope (A),
failing to find Descriptor in the parent scope (test_set_name). This
resulted in undeclared identifier errors for sibling nested classes.

The fix enables correct resolution of nested class references in lazy
attribute initializers and other contexts where classes reference
sibling classes defined at the same nesting level.
